query:
SELECT 
  a.id, a.animalCode, a.acquisitionDate, a.exitDate, a.isActive,
  a.purchaseCost, a.categoryId,
  DATEDIFF(COALESCE(a.exitDate, CURDATE()), a.acquisitionDate) AS daysOnFarm
FROM animals a
WHERE a.animalCode = 'FAT0003';
